title: Length of the Longest Alphabetical Continuous Substring
titleCn: 最长的字母序连续子字符串的长度

testcases.input: s = "abacaba" Output: 2 Explanation: There are 4 distinct continuous substrings: "a", "b", "c" and "ab". "ab" is the longest continuous substring.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: There are 4 distinct continuous substrings: "a", "b", "c" and "ab". "ab" is the longest continuous substring.

testcases.input: s = "abcde" Output: 5 Explanation: "abcde" is the longest continuous substring.
